name: Turnip and Apple Whip
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Peel and quarter fresh turnips.
3. Do not defrost frozen turnips.
4. Combine all ingredients in a baking dish with a cover.
5. Cover and place in the oven for 35 minutes.
6. Remove from oven, transfer contents of the baking dish to a food processor.
7. Puree until smooth.
8. Spoon the puree into a serving dish.
9. Serve immediately.
